allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_engine_brain_status
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Summarize generated Engine Brain, validation, doctor, and pack status.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_engine_brain_self_check
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Verify plugin install state and generated workspace evidence.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_engine_brain_brief
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Return the generated P7 operator decision and next safe command.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_control_center_cockpit
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Return read-only Control Center runtime evidence, P7 cockpit, and action-audit status.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_repo_hygiene_refresh
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Dry-run-first refresh of repo hygiene evidence with Control Center-compatible audit logging.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_api_cost_refresh
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Dry-run-first refresh of API cost evidence with Control Center-compatible audit logging.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_evidence_pack_refresh
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Dry-run-first refresh of release evidence with Control Center-compatible audit logging.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_engine_brain_refresh
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Dry-run-first refresh of Engine Brain generated context with Control Center-compatible audit logging.

allowed_mcp_tools.name: ctoai_p7_cockpit_smoke_refresh
allowed_mcp_tools.purpose: Dry-run-first refresh of P7 cockpit smoke evidence with Control Center-compatible audit logging.

blocked_action_classes.blocked_until: Risk metadata, confirmation modal, operator/owner role gate, and audit evidence exist.
Owner-only typed confirmation, dry-run path, rollback evidence, and audit review exist.
Never expose through plugin or Control Center UI.

gates_before_actions: Every plugin tool must have a stable risk class from docs/CTOAI_COMMAND_RISK_MODEL.md.
Every write-capable tool must be represented in Control Center action audit before enablement.
Only ctoai_repo_hygiene_refresh, ctoai_api_cost_refresh, ctoai_evidence_pack_refresh, ctoai_engine_brain_refresh, and ctoai_p7_cockpit_smoke_refresh may be exposed as safe_write in this wave.
Every safe-write MCP tool must default to dry-run and append runtime/control-center/action-audit.jsonl.
No tool may bypass PromoteLiveCtoa -ApproveLiveDeploy for Solteria Helper live promotion.
No tool may read .env, logs, databases, runtime client state, or private Solteria client data into generated context.
P6 readiness, P7 operator brief, release evidence pack, doc sync, and secret guardrail must all be current.
next_safe_command: Use ctoai_repo_hygiene_refresh, ctoai_api_cost_refresh, ctoai_evidence_pack_refresh, ctoai_engine_brain_refresh, and ctoai_p7_cockpit_smoke_refresh with dry_run=true before any confirmed refresh.
policy: P7 operator workflow allows five audited safe_write evidence/context refresh tools. Deploy/live actions stay blocked.
